policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-evh-06 - Authorization for the Event Hub Namespace'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+Event+Hubs#IncidentremediationEventHubs#drcp-evh-06 .
